# Personal Notes

## Handy Commands

<div class="copy-box">
<pre id="gitcmd">git add . && git commit -m "Update site" && git push</pre>
<button onclick="copyCommand()">📋</button>
</div>

<script>
function copyCommand() {
  const text = document.getElementById("gitcmd").innerText;
  navigator.clipboard.writeText(text);
}
</script>
